Name: Marcus Webb
How do you feel now?: Honestly not much different to when I started. I was hoping to see more improvement by now.
Biggest positive: I have learned a bit more about my nervous system even if I haven't seen the big changes I was hoping for.
Would you recommend?: I would want to see more results in myself before recommending it to others.
Improvements: More personal support or check-ins would have helped. I felt quite lost at times.
